speaker: LEPIDUS
text: Trouble yourselves no further. Pray you hasten

speaker: AGRIPPA
text: Will e’en but kiss Octavia, and we’ll follow.

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: Till I shall see you in your soldiers’ dress,

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: Which will become you both, farewell.

speaker: MAECENAS
text: As I conceive the journey, be at the Mount

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: My purposes do draw me much about.

speaker: LEPIDUS
text: You’ll win two days upon me.
